subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-04-25
subcodes.first_line: The believers of Persia made the greatest self-sacrifice and the trip was made possible. They made large and small contributions
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @work as worship, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
